{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output does not clearly disentangle the convex/non-convex framing, making it difficult to understand the contribution.",
    "R1.2": "The rate claims are mutually inconsistent, with a √T rate and a log(1/ε) rate being presented as if compatible.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not provide clear evidence to support the claims made in the text.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, with some dimensions being mentioned but not addressed.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors and fabrications, undermining the credibility of the analysis.",
    "RX.5": "The output blends sources without traceability, making it difficult to understand the origin of the claims made in the text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent output does not clearly disentangle the convex/non-convex framing, making it difficult to understand the contribution.
rationale.R1.2: The rate claims are mutually inconsistent, with a √T rate and a log(1/ε) rate being presented as if compatible.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not provide clear evidence to support the claims made in the text.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, with some dimensions being mentioned but not addressed.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors and fabrications, undermining the credibility of the analysis.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability, making it difficult to understand the origin of the claims made in the text.
